title: agropyron repens subsp. pungens
intro: Agropyron repens subsp. pungens, commonly known as crested brome, is a type of grassy plant belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Agropyron repens subsp. pungens is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
